tests.scenario: User seeks emotional support and guidance
tests.expected_result: The system provides a clear and accessible pathway for users to seek emotional support and guidance.

tests.scenario: User searches for affordable mental health resources
tests.expected_result: The system provides free or low-cost mental health resources for users.

tests.scenario: User rates the effectiveness of the support
steps: Rate the effectiveness of the support
tests.expected_result: At least 80% of users rate the support as effective.

tests.scenario: User requests support with limited time
tests.expected_result: The system provides support within a maximum of 5 minutes of user request.

tests.scenario: User chooses between anonymous and personalized support
tests.expected_result: The system provides users with the option to select their preferred level of anonymity.

tests.scenario: User rates the effectiveness of CBT-based support
steps: Rate the effectiveness of the support
tests.expected_result: At least 80% of users rate the CBT-based support as effective.

tests.scenario: User accesses effectiveness metrics and user ratings
steps: Access effectiveness metrics and user ratings
tests.expected_result: The system provides users with access to effectiveness metrics and user ratings.

tests.scenario: User compares support to human therapists or other mental health resources
tests.expected_result: The system provides users with a clear comparison of its support to human therapists or other mental health resources.

tests.scenario: User rates the effectiveness of personalized support
steps: Rate the effectiveness of the support
tests.expected_result: At least 80% of users rate the personalized support as effective.
The system demonstrates a clear process for incorporating user feedback and reviews into its development roadmap.
